title: Save & Load + Auto-Save
description: Add persistence so layouts survive page refreshes, plus 3 named save slots with thumbnails.

tasks.title: Auto-save grid state to localStorage on every change
tasks.details: Create a saveToLocalStorage() function that serializes the full game state (grid, train position, trainDir) and writes it to localStorage key 'trainTracks_autosave'. Call this after every mutation: placePiece, removePiece, rotatePiece, placeTrain, clearAll, and after random track generation completes.

tasks.title: Auto-restore on page load
tasks.details: Create loadFromLocalStorage() that reads 'trainTracks_autosave', parses it, and restores the grid and train state. Call this in init() before the first renderAllCells(). The user should never notice — seamless restore.

tasks.title: Save modal with 3 named slots
tasks.details: Add a 💾 Save button to the controls bar. Clicking it opens an overlay/modal with 3 save slots. Each slot shows: editable name (default 'Slot 1/2/3'), mini canvas thumbnail of the layout, timestamp of last save. Buttons per slot: Save, Load, Delete. Modal has a close/X button.
tasks.section: New SAVE MODAL HTML + CSS + JS

tasks.title: Render mini thumbnail for save slots
tasks.details: Create renderThumbnail(gridData, trainData) that draws a small (120x80) canvas representing the grid. Track cells get brown squares, scenery gets green dots, train gets a red dot, empty cells get grass green. This is fast and recognizable without needing full SVG rendering.

tasks.title: Save/Load/Delete per slot
tasks.details: Save: serialize current state + name + timestamp to localStorage key 'trainTracks_slot_{1-3}'. Load: parse slot data, restore grid/train, close modal, show toast. Delete: clear slot from localStorage, update modal UI. Each operation shows a toast confirmation.

tasks.title: Toast confirmations for save/load operations
tasks.details: Show '💾 Saved!' on save, '📂 Loaded!' on load, '🗑️ Slot cleared!' on delete. Use existing showToast() function.

acceptance_criteria: AC1: Build a track layout, refresh page → identical layout restored (grid + train position)
AC2: All 3 save slots work independently (save to slot 1, different layout to slot 2, load slot 1 → original layout)
AC3: Thumbnails in save modal show recognizable mini layout (track = brown, scenery = green, train = red)
AC4: Save/Load/Delete buttons function correctly with toast confirmations
AC5: Works with all piece types (straight, curve, tjunction, crossover, bridge, station), scenery (tree, house, cow), and train position
AC6: clearAll() clears the autosave too (fresh start)
AC7: Save modal can be opened and closed without side effects
AC8: Slot names are editable and persist across saves
AC9: Timestamps display in human-readable format
AC10: No regressions — drag-and-drop, rotation, undo, random generation, play/stop all still work
testing_focus: State serialization completeness (all piece types + rotations)
Modal open/close doesn't interfere with game state
Random generate → auto-save → refresh → layout intact
